{{Infobox artifact
| name = Silent Core
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Silent Core]] is located beneath [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The eastern chamber has been influenced by the [[Silent Core]] for hundreds of years.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Silent Core]] is a purple-white core.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
